creator: phk@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 212016
patch to find all RAM on rockpro64

On my newly arrived RockPro64 u-boot only found half the RAM.

The attached patch, found at:

   http://u-boot.10912.n7.nabble.com/rockchip-rk3399-TPL-rockpro64-Wrong-memory-size-detected-td382441.html

Fixes this, so the full 4GB ram is found.
